_meta.verification_method: Primary sources: NHS website, individual organisation websites, LA council pages
_meta.review_trigger: Annual minimum, or immediately on notification of number change
_meta.note: This file holds LA-specific data for safeguarding exits only. National floors (Rape Crisis E&W, National DV Helpline, Childline) are hardcoded in safeguarding handlers and are not duplicated here. This file provides the local layer on top of those national floors.

sarc._note: One SARC service covers all 7 WMCA LAs. No per-LA variation required. Both adult and under-18 lines share the same number.

adult.name: Horizon SARC
adult.referral_note: Appointments only — call before attending. Self-referral available for 18+ without police involvement. Police and professional referrals also via same number.

under_18.name: West Midlands Regional Children and Young People Sexual Assault Service (CYPSAS)
under_18.age_range: Birth to 17, and 18-25 with complex needs
under_18.referral_note: Under 13 must be referred by police or social care. Age 13+ can self-refer. Call before attending.

coventry_secondary._note: Blue Sky Centre (George Eliot Hospital, Nuneaton) also serves Coventry and Warwickshire. Primarily Warwickshire. Horizon SARC is the primary route for Coventry. Do not surface until phone number is confirmed from primary source.
coventry_secondary.name: Blue Sky Centre

dv_local._note: Local DV crisis lines per LA. Supplement national floors hardcoded in handlers: National DV Helpline 0808 2000 247, ManKind Initiative 0808 800 1170, Galop 0800 999 5428.

birmingham.name: Birmingham & Solihull Women's Aid
birmingham.ooh_fallback: National DV Helpline 0808 2000 247 covers outside hours

solihull.name: Birmingham & Solihull Women's Aid
solihull.ooh_fallback: National DV Helpline 0808 2000 247 covers outside hours

coventry.name: Valley House
coventry.note: All genders — primary route for male and LGBTQ+ users in Coventry. Accommodation referrals and community support.

coventry.name: Coventry Haven — Safe to Talk Helpline
coventry.ooh_fallback: Valley House 0800 328 9084 (24/7, all genders) covers outside hours
coventry.verified_source: coventryhaven.co.uk + Coventry City Council DV page

sandwell.name: Black Country Women's Aid
sandwell.target: Women and children (primary). Men: call office for referral.

dudley.name: Black Country Women's Aid
dudley.target: Women and children (primary). Men: call office for referral.

walsall.name: Black Country Women's Aid
walsall.target: Women and children (primary). Men: call office for referral.

wolverhampton.name: The Haven Wolverhampton
wolverhampton.target: Women and children aged 16+. LGBTQ+ explicitly included.
wolverhampton.note: Primary DV service for Wolverhampton. For men: ManKind Initiative (hardcoded national) covers gap.

routing_notes.sarc_all_las: Horizon SARC (0330 223 0099) is the verified local SARC for all 7 LAs. Surface alongside Rape Crisis E&W national floor (0808 500 2222). For users under 18: CYPSAS (same number, different service name and URL).
routing_notes.dv_female: Surface LA-specific local line from dv_local. Where is_24hr is false, note that National DV Helpline covers outside hours.
routing_notes.dv_male: ManKind Initiative (hardcoded) is primary male route. BCWA office line accepts male referrals in Sandwell/Dudley/Walsall. Valley House Coventry and The Haven Wolverhampton explicitly include all genders.
routing_notes.dv_lgbtq: Galop (hardcoded) is primary LGBTQ+ route. Valley House Coventry and The Haven Wolverhampton explicitly include LGBTQ+ users.
routing_notes.coventry_sarc: Blue Sky Centre entry is marked NEEDS VERIFICATION. Do not surface until confirmed. Horizon SARC covers Coventry and is safe default.
